zh.St Columb Major, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anora Lambourne於大約1374年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親Sir William Lambourne35歲，母親Joan de Soor31歲。她於1390年與Sir John Arundell VI在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1431年1月在英國可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anora Lambourne于大约1374年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲Sir William Lambourne35岁，母亲Joan de Soor31岁。她于1390年与Sir John Arundell VI在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1431年1月在英国可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑。

nameMeanings.name: Lambourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from Lambourn in Berkshire or, less probably, Lambourne in Essex. The Berkshire placename is probably from Old English lamb ‘lamb’ + burna ‘spring, stream’, but the Essex name may alternatively contain Old English lām ‘loam, clay’ as its first element.

nameMeanings.name: Anora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Anora Lambourne was born about 1374, in Cornwall, England, her father, Sir William Lambourne, was 35 and her mother, Joan de Soor, was 31. She married Sir John Arundell VI in 1390, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in January 1431, in St Columb Major, Cornwall, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in St Columb Major, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anora Lambourne est née environ 1374, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Lambourne, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan de Soor, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Arundell VI en 1390, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en janvier 1431, à St Columb Major, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à St Columb Major, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anora Lambourne um 1374 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Lambourne 35 und ihre Mutter Joan de Soor 31. Sie hat 1390 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Sir John Arundell VI geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Januar 1431 im Alter von 58 Jahren in St Columb Major, Cornwall, England und wurde in St Columb Major, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anora Lambourne è nata il circa 1374 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir William Lambourne, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Joan de Soor, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Arundell VI nel 1390, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1431, nel St Columb Major, Cornwall, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anora Lambourneが約1374年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir William Lambourneは35歳，母Joan de Soorは31歳であった。1390年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでSir John Arundell VIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1431年1月にイギリスコルンワルスト コルンブ マジャーで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルスト コルンブ マジャーにて埋葬された。

ko.St Columb-Major, Cornwall, England: 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 콜럼 마조르
ko.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 콜럼 마조르
ko.lifeSummary: Anora Lambourne(이)가 대략 1374년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Lambourne(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Soor(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Sir John Arundell VI(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1431년 1월 영국 코른월 스트 콜럼 마조르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 콜럼 마조르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anora Lambourne nasceu aproximadamente 1374, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Lambourne, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Soor, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Arundell VI em 1390, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em janeiro de 1431, em St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: ст колумб маджор, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anora Lambourne родилась около 1374 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Lambourne было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Soor, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Arundell VI в 1390 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла январь 1431 г. в местности ст колумб маджор, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности ст колумб маджор, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anora Lambourne nació aproximadamente 1374, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Lambourne, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Joan de Soor, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir John Arundell VI en 1390, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en enero de 1431, en St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
